verdicts.note: The record claims 'official_meta_mcp_exists' and links to 'https://mcp.facebook.com/ads', but no evidence shows Meta hosts an MCP server at that URL. The only MCP evidence is the open-source community implementation at https://github.com/pipeboard-co/meta-ads-mcp, which is NOT an official Meta server. The URL 'https://mcp.facebook.com/ads' appears fabricated.
Evidence from api-inventory.md confirms OAuth2 with User/System User/Page tokens, ads_management/ads_read scopes, and access_token parameter or Bearer header. Matches record.
Evidence confirms Development Access is self-serve but Standard/Advanced Access requires App Review and business verification (singhamandeep.com, get-ryze.ai). 'admin-approval' is correct.
Evidence from get-ryze.ai confirms Development Access is 60 points/300s, Standard Access requires App Review. The record's description aligns.
api-inventory.md and DEVELOPER_GUIDE.md confirm REST API (Graph API-based Marketing API) with broad surface covering campaigns, ads, insights, audiences. Official PHP SDK exists.
Evidence supports 'buildable-with-caveats': Development Access is self-serve but heavily rate-limited (60 points/300s), production requires App Review. Matches the stated blocker.
Evidence confirms dev access is 60 points/300s and only for testing on owned accounts; production requires App Review and business verification (singhamandeep.com, get-ryze.ai).
Flag 'official_meta_mcp_exists' is false; no evidence shows Meta hosts an MCP server. Only community open-source MCP (pipeboard-co/meta-ads-mcp) exists.

revised.name: Meta Ads
revised.one_liner: Meta Ads (Marketing API) lets developers programmatically manage Facebook/Instagram advertising campaigns via a broad REST API secured by OAuth2, free to use but gated by tiered rate limits requiring Meta App Review for production-scale access.

auth_methods.notes: User, System User, or Page access tokens with ads_management/ads_read scopes; passed as access_token query param or Authorization: Bearer header.

revised.self_serve_notes: Development Access tier is self-serve with a Facebook developer app (limited quota, 60 points/300s), but production-grade Standard/Advanced Access requires Meta App Review, business verification, and use-case approval.

api_surface.notes: Graph API-based Marketing API covering campaigns, ad sets, ads, creatives, insights, audiences, etc. Also has an official PHP Business SDK and other language SDKs.

revised.main_blocker: Full production access requires Meta App Review and business verification; default dev access is heavily rate-limited (60 points/300s) and only usable for testing on owned accounts.

evidence.supports: OAuth2 auth details, scopes, rate limits, REST API surface
Official SDK usage with app ID/secret/access token
App Review process required for Advanced Access
Tiered access model: Development, Standard, Advanced
Existence of open-source Meta Ads MCP servers
